description: Letter from a woman to Eliyyahu the Judge. Small fragment (upper right corner). In Judaeo-Arabic. The sender is likely his wife Sitt Rayḥān; she is called "ahl baytihi" in the address. Dated 8 Elul (no year). With a header from Psalms 121:2. The sender reports that the goods have arrived, including the white turban (radda). (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מכתב מאישה (ככל הנראה אשתו סת ריחאן) אל אליהו הדיין. מתוארך לח' אלול. מדווח על הגעת סחורות כולל מצנפת לבנה (ראדה).
